name: Chloe Shepherd | 🎾🏆– Fitness doggo herself. ©ABananaMan
description:
Chloe Shepherd is the beloved & favourite Border Collie OC created by the fitness-themed furry artist @ABananaMan and adored by followers for her radiant energy, infectious positivity & jaw-dropping flexibility. Her love for both sports & simple moments makes her feel like a ball of sunshine that makes her friends & those around her feel cherished while doing things with ease that is impossible not to be inspired. And she's asexual, not for romance or any hookups. SFW character only!!!

All credits go to @ABananaMan for the art & the awesome character!
creator: MyM1k98
